summary: Local implementation and verification for issues #4-#19 pass the targeted contracts. Because this is an L-size bundle spanning runtime behavior, data preservation, and user-visible contracts, hash-bound human approval remains required before PR readiness.
residual_risk: The bundle changes broad dashboard copy and operational defaults, so product review should confirm final Japanese wording and Kabosu naming before release.
Wake meeting resolution was covered with unit tests and compose config checks, but a live meeting E2E still requires real owner-scoped credentials and an active meeting.
Final transcription data preservation is covered by unit tests; production rollout should monitor skipped_no_speaker_events counts after deploy.
The repository-wide lint command has known broad lint debt outside the targeted verification set, so this pass relies on focused tests plus dashboard build/typecheck.
